schema: CREATE TABLE customers (name TEXT, country TEXT, age INTEGER)
question: Which customers are from Canada?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE customers (name TEXT, country TEXT, age INTEGER)
INSERT INTO customers VALUES ('Alice','Canada',31),('Bob','US',22),('Chao','Canada',28)
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE country = 'Canada' ORDER BY name

schema: CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER, status TEXT, amount INTEGER)
question: How many orders are completed?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER, status TEXT, amount INTEGER)
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1,'completed',20),(2,'pending',10),(3,'completed',35)
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

schema: CREATE TABLE products (product TEXT, category TEXT, price INTEGER)
question: What is the highest price for electronics products?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE products (product TEXT, category TEXT, price INTEGER)
INSERT INTO products VALUES ('phone','electronics',700),('chair','furniture',90),('laptop','electronics',1200)
reference_sql: SELECT MAX(price) FROM products WHERE category = 'electronics'

schema: CREATE TABLE employees (name TEXT, department TEXT, salary INTEGER)
question: Which employees in engineering have salary greater than 100000?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE employees (name TEXT, department TEXT, salary INTEGER)
INSERT INTO employees VALUES ('Ana','engineering',120000),('Ben','engineering',90000),('Dee','sales',130000)
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM employees WHERE department = 'engineering' AND salary > 100000

schema: CREATE TABLE games (team TEXT, wins INTEGER)
question: Which team has the most wins?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE games (team TEXT, wins INTEGER)
INSERT INTO games VALUES ('A',8),('B',12),('C',6)
reference_sql: SELECT team FROM games ORDER BY wins DESC LIMIT 1

schema:
CREATE TABLE authors (id INTEGER, name TEXT)
CREATE TABLE books (title TEXT, author_id INTEGER)
question: Which book titles were written by Alice?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE authors (id INTEGER, name TEXT)
CREATE TABLE books (title TEXT, author_id INTEGER)
INSERT INTO authors VALUES (1,'Alice'),(2,'Bob')
INSERT INTO books VALUES ('SQL Basics',1),('Systems',2),('Advanced SQL',1)
reference_sql: SELECT books.title FROM books JOIN authors ON books.author_id = authors.id WHERE authors.name = 'Alice' ORDER BY books.title

schema: CREATE TABLE sales (region TEXT, amount INTEGER)
question: How many sales records are there for each region?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (region TEXT, amount INTEGER)
INSERT INTO sales VALUES ('east',10),('east',15),('west',7)
reference_sql: SELECT region, COUNT(*) FROM sales GROUP BY region ORDER BY region

schema: CREATE TABLE sales (region TEXT, amount INTEGER)
question: What is the total sales amount for each region?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (region TEXT, amount INTEGER)
INSERT INTO sales VALUES ('east',10),('east',15),('west',7)
reference_sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) FROM sales GROUP BY region ORDER BY region

schema: CREATE TABLE exams (student TEXT, subject TEXT, score INTEGER)
question: What is the average score for math exams?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE exams (student TEXT, subject TEXT, score INTEGER)
INSERT INTO exams VALUES ('A','math',80),('B','math',90),('C','history',70)
reference_sql: SELECT AVG(score) FROM exams WHERE subject = 'math'

schema: CREATE TABLE movies (title TEXT, year INTEGER)
question: Which movies were released between 2000 and 2010?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE movies (title TEXT, year INTEGER)
INSERT INTO movies VALUES ('Old',1999),('Middle',2005),('New',2015)
reference_sql: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

schema: CREATE TABLE cities (name TEXT, country TEXT)
question: Which city names start with San?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE cities (name TEXT, country TEXT)
INSERT INTO cities VALUES ('San Jose','US'),('San Diego','US'),('Toronto','Canada')
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM cities WHERE name LIKE 'San%' ORDER BY name

schema: CREATE TABLE tickets (id INTEGER, status TEXT)
question: Which ticket ids are not closed?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE tickets (id INTEGER, status TEXT)
INSERT INTO tickets VALUES (1,'open'),(2,'closed'),(3,'pending')
reference_sql: SELECT id FROM tickets WHERE status != 'closed' ORDER BY id

schema: CREATE TABLE inventory (item TEXT, category TEXT)
question: What are the distinct inventory categories?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE inventory (item TEXT, category TEXT)
INSERT INTO inventory VALUES ('phone','electronics'),('laptop','electronics'),('chair','furniture')
reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM inventory ORDER BY category

schema: CREATE TABLE weather (city TEXT, temperature INTEGER)
question: What is the lowest temperature recorded?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE weather (city TEXT, temperature INTEGER)
INSERT INTO weather VALUES ('A',30),('B',12),('C',25)
reference_sql: SELECT MIN(temperature) FROM weather

schema: CREATE TABLE runners (name TEXT, time_seconds INTEGER)
question: Who had the second fastest time?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE runners (name TEXT, time_seconds INTEGER)
INSERT INTO runners VALUES ('A',120),('B',115),('C',130)
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM runners ORDER BY time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

schema:
CREATE TABLE customers (id INTEGER, name TEXT)
CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER, customer_id INTEGER, amount INTEGER)
question: What is the total order amount for Alice?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE customers (id INTEGER, name TEXT)
CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER, customer_id INTEGER, amount INTEGER)
INSERT INTO customers VALUES (1,'Alice'),(2,'Bob')
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1,1,20),(2,1,30),(3,2,50)
reference_sql: SELECT SUM(orders.amount) FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id WHERE customers.name = 'Alice'

schema: CREATE TABLE products (name TEXT, price INTEGER)
question: Which products have price greater than the average price?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE products (name TEXT, price INTEGER)
INSERT INTO products VALUES ('cheap',10),('mid',20),('expensive',40)
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products)

schema: CREATE TABLE visits (user_id INTEGER, page TEXT)
question: Which users visited more than one page?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE visits (user_id INTEGER, page TEXT)
INSERT INTO visits VALUES (1,'home'),(1,'search'),(2,'home')
reference_sql: SELECT user_id FROM visits GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(page) > 1

schema: CREATE TABLE events (name TEXT, event_date TEXT)
question: Which events happened after 2024-01-01?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE events (name TEXT, event_date TEXT)
INSERT INTO events VALUES ('launch','2024-02-01'),('planning','2023-12-15')
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM events WHERE event_date > '2024-01-01'

schema: CREATE TABLE tasks (title TEXT, completed INTEGER)
question: Which tasks are completed?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE tasks (title TEXT, completed INTEGER)
INSERT INTO tasks VALUES ('write',1),('review',0),('ship',1)
reference_sql: SELECT title FROM tasks WHERE completed = 1 ORDER BY title

schema: CREATE TABLE teams (name TEXT, league TEXT)
question: Which teams are in the nba league?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE teams (name TEXT, league TEXT)
INSERT INTO teams VALUES ('Raptors','nba'),('Leafs','nhl')
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM teams WHERE league = 'nba'

schema: CREATE TABLE profiles (name TEXT, email TEXT)
question: How many profiles have no email?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE profiles (name TEXT, email TEXT)
INSERT INTO profiles VALUES ('A',NULL),('B','b@example.com'),('C',NULL)
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM profiles WHERE email IS NULL

schema: CREATE TABLE profiles (name TEXT, email TEXT)
question: Which profiles have an email?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE profiles (name TEXT, email TEXT)
INSERT INTO profiles VALUES ('A',NULL),('B','b@example.com'),('C',NULL)
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM profiles WHERE email IS NOT NULL

schema: CREATE TABLE cars (model TEXT, year INTEGER, price INTEGER)
question: Which cars are newer than 2020 and cost less than 30000?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE cars (model TEXT, year INTEGER, price INTEGER)
reference_sql: SELECT model FROM cars WHERE year > 2020 AND price < 30000

schema: CREATE TABLE logs (user_id INTEGER, action TEXT)
question: How many distinct users are in the logs?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE logs (user_id INTEGER, action TEXT)
INSERT INTO logs VALUES (1,'open'),(1,'click'),(2,'open')
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM logs

schema:
CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name TEXT, category_id INTEGER)
CREATE TABLE categories (id INTEGER, label TEXT)
question: Which product names are in the food category?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name TEXT, category_id INTEGER)
CREATE TABLE categories (id INTEGER, label TEXT)
INSERT INTO categories VALUES (1,'food'),(2,'tools')
INSERT INTO products VALUES (1,'apple',1),(2,'hammer',2),(3,'bread',1)
reference_sql: SELECT products.name FROM products JOIN categories ON products.category_id = categories.id WHERE categories.label = 'food' ORDER BY products.name

schema: CREATE TABLE orders (customer TEXT, amount INTEGER)
question: Which customer has the highest total order amount?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE orders (customer TEXT, amount INTEGER)
INSERT INTO orders VALUES ('Alice',20),('Alice',30),('Bob',70)
reference_sql: SELECT customer FROM orders GROUP BY customer ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC LIMIT 1

schema: CREATE TABLE athletes (name TEXT, points INTEGER)
question: Show each athlete name as player and points as score.
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE athletes (name TEXT, points INTEGER)
INSERT INTO athletes VALUES ('A',10),('B',20)
reference_sql: SELECT name AS player, points AS score FROM athletes ORDER BY name

schema: CREATE TABLE articles (title TEXT, body TEXT)
question: Which article titles mention SQL in the body?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE articles (title TEXT, body TEXT)
INSERT INTO articles VALUES ('Intro','Learn SQL basics'),('Other','Python notes')
reference_sql: SELECT title FROM articles WHERE body LIKE '%SQL%'

schema: CREATE TABLE users (name TEXT, country TEXT)
question: Which users are from France?
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE users (name TEXT, country TEXT)
INSERT INTO users VALUES ('Alice','Canada'),('Bob','US')
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM users WHERE country = 'France'
